title: State initialized from a mount effect
message: Your users see an extra render with empty "pendingCount" because a useEffect sets its starting value.
help: Pass the initial value directly to useState() instead of setting it from a mount-only useEffect. For SSR hydration, prefer useSyncExternalStore().

title: State initialized from a mount effect
message: Your users see an extra render with empty "state" because a useEffect sets its starting value.
help: Pass the initial value directly to useState() instead of setting it from a mount-only useEffect. For SSR hydration, prefer useSyncExternalStore().

title: State initialized from a mount effect
message: Your users see an extra render with empty "isVisible" because a useEffect sets its starting value.
help: Pass the initial value directly to useState() instead of setting it from a mount-only useEffect. For SSR hydration, prefer useSyncExternalStore().
